decisions.decision: Tier 1 #4 form: inline replace IndikatorCard (zero modal/drawer)
decisions.rationale: Konsisten dengan accordion-style spec, mobile-friendly, no new package

decisions.decision: Tier 4 layout: gate first → conditional sections inline (estate universal + asuransi jiwa kalau Ya)
decisions.rationale: Single panel scroll, no nested accordion (UAT phase 13 confirm double-accordion confusing)

decisions.decision: Mutation: optimistic update via React Query setQueryData + supabase upsert (lazy create on user_id PK)
decisions.rationale: Sama pattern existing transactions/goals mutations, smooth UX

decisions.decision: Gate toggle: preserve life_coverage* answers, hide UI saat has_dependents=false (non-destructive)
decisions.rationale: Schema allow NULL, no friction, kalau user toggle Ya lagi data kembali

decisions.decision: Estate input: 3-state radio per item (Ya/Tidak/Belum diisi → boolean true/false/NULL)
decisions.rationale: Konsisten pattern life_coverage_post_employment, distinguish unanswered dari Tidak

decisions.decision: View-As mode: form visible disabled + banner kuning + submit hidden + mutation guard
decisions.rationale: Konsisten View-As pattern di /pensiun + /goals; defense-in-depth selain RLS

next_action: Run /clear → /gsd-plan-phase 14 (Phase 14 CONTEXT.md siap, researcher + planner generate plans)
